profile.name: Favour Emeka
profile.summary: I design and build accessible, type-safe interface systems for Vue and Nuxt — from component libraries to the products that ship on top of them.

projects.name: CentoUI
projects.description: Copy-paste Vue component library with a single-file theme and a CLI-first workflow.

projects.description: Type-safe form state and validation for Vue and Nuxt, with a minimal composable API.

projects.name: Zod SQLite

projects.name: usePromise
projects.description: Vue composable for async work — reactive state, cancellation, and race-condition safety.
